reviews.review_msg: She is a great prof! Make sure you go to every single class to write down all the answers that we have discussed during class! Her exams are easy and she somehow curved the grades in order to make us to get a better mark!

Very easy. fun class. If you attend the lectures and do the assignments, and not study at all, you will end up having a C. If you study the chapters right before the test, you will easily get a B if not an A. Take it!
Fantastic Professor. Although the midterm/final/assignments were really easy, she went much further into detail in lecture. I definitely recommend this prof.

I can tell Larysa is very passionate about linguistics and makes the class as easy as possible. And by easy, I mean she literally gives you questions at the start of every class on paper, with a select number on the MT, written verbatim.
Not a good professor. Doesn't teach well, doesn't encourage questions. Poor performance.

Lectures are all textbook based but she does 10% participation so you're showing up to have the textbook read to you for 3 hours. When someone asks her a question she's almost defensive all the time and her answer doesn't help. Has a strong accent.
